intervention_notes: Post-completion review prompt: user asked 'what might you have missed?' — caught 4 gaps (MinIO inheritance, Content-Type, issues file not updated, HACK comments without ticket IDs)

No oscillations in M9 itself. Caught and fixed 4 pre-existing integration test failures from M4/M7 ISS-018 (integration counterpart not updated when unit tests were fixed). LL-013 recorded.
